    Specification
    Brand NameDrops
    Yarn NameAir
    Shade Count60
    Yarn WeightAran
    Ball Weight50g
    Length150 metres
    Blend28% Polyamide
    7% Wool
    65% Alpaca
    Needle Size5mm
    Knitting Tension17 stitches and 22 rows for a 10x10cm tension square using 5mm needles
    Hook Size5mm
    Product Description

    Drops Air - All Colours - Product Description

    A lovely and soft "blow yarn" made from super soft baby alpaca and cosy and warm merino wool, Drops Air's construction is unique, based on the newest yarn technologies, where instead of spinning, the fibres of baby alpaca and merino wool are air blown into a tube, which makes garments made in this yarn about 30-35% lighter than those made with conventional spun yarns of the same thickness. Drops Air is - as its name suggest - a beautifully airy yarn that feels luxurious against the skin, making it perfect for accessories, shawls, sweaters, and jackets in both textured and cable patterns.

    Drops offer thousands of free patterns, covering their entire range of yarns, all of which are available to download and print out for free from the Garnstudio website - Garnstudio are the manufacturers of Drops yarn.

    You can find details of all the free patterns made specifically in Drops Air yarn by visiting the Drops Air pattern section of the Garnstudio website.

    US customers: Please click here for information regarding US customs fees
    US Customs InformationX

    As of 29th August 2025, US customs tariffs/duties are applicable to ALL goods entering the US. The US customs import fees for this product are estimated as follows:

    • - Country of origin (manufacture) rate: 10%

    The total US customs fees will be displayed at checkout once you have added a US address for delivery.

    There is also a weight limit of 1.8kg per order. if you wish to order more than 1.8kg of products for delivery to the US, multiple separate orders will need to be placed.

    We are trying our best to adapt to the new rules, and to be as transparent as possible regarding the new fees

    Care Instructions
    Do Not Bleach
    Do Not Iron
    Do Not Tumble Dry
    Do Not Use Fabric Softener
    Flat Dry
    Hand Wash Only
    PCE Dry Clean
